title: Mera Balam Thanedaar
subTitle: Drishti offers to secure a job and settle Devendra's pending dues, and Sulakshana instructs Bulbul to prepare a special drink for the occasion of Mahashivratri.

title: Parineetii
subTitle: Neeti asks Parineet to help with her wedding ceremony. Rajeev meets Neeti's mother ahead of the wedding.

title: Shakti Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki
subTitle: Seeing Soumya looking worried, Surbhi asks her about the talk with Kareena. Soumya helps Raavi's husband sneak into the house.

title: Parineetii
subTitle: Neeti asks Parineet to help with her wedding ceremony. Rajeev meets Neeti's mother ahead of the wedding.

title: Mata Saraswati
subTitle: Navigating 14 worlds, Goddess Saraswati, the celestial embodiment of wisdom and art, seeks the arcane knowledge needed to restore Lord Narayan's severed head.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: Mayor Goodway and Alex get cast adrift at sea, and then, Ryder gets stranded trying to rescue Garby the goat from a cliff edge.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: Cap'n Turbot stumbles into a secret cavern that was once a pirate's hideout, the PAW Patrol searches for clues to find the missing pieces of a treasure map.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: Someone has been swiping fish off Cap'n Turbot's boat. Adventure Bay's newest dolphin pup accidentally swims into a shallow-water stream.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: When the pups and Cap'n Turbot camp out under a magical moon, they are transformed into merpups so they can perform an underwater rescue.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: Mayor Goodway asks the PAW Patrol to rescue her twin niece and nephew from a tree. Mayor Goodway receives a package of piglets instead of the fireworks she was expecting.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: The pups must come to the rescue when a family of monkeys scatters into the jungle after being scared off by lava erupting from a volcano.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: The pups must chase down Mayor Humdinger and the Kit-tastrophe Crew when they steal gold discovered in Adventure Bay. Mayor Humdinger orders the Kit-tastrophe Crew to steal the Paw Patroller.

title: Motu Patlu
subTitle: Best friends Motu and Patlu live in Furfuri Nagar. When they land in the most hilarious situations, Motu is the one who generally creates problems, while Patlu tries to solve them.

title: Motu Patlu
subTitle: Motu learns forgiveness, but his newfound tolerance sets a dangerous thief free. Can he make up for his mistake?

title: Khatra Khatra Khatra
subTitle: Aditya challenges Harsh to go on a date and pose as a single young man. However, things do not go as planned and a livid Bharti turns up at the venue.

title: Salaam-E-Ishq
subTitle: Aaliya and Zain are forced to get married to each other. However, they don't have any feelings for each other, except hatred.

title: Sasural Simar Ka
subTitle: Prem and Simar have to do the Janmashtami Aarti, but Prem leaves on the pretext of an important meeting. Simar believes he won't come back but he joins the Aarti at the last minute.

title: Shakti Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki
subTitle: Preeto believes Harman and Surbhi are hiding a secret and decides to search their room. Varun sounds the alarm after seeing a mysterious man sneaking out of the house.

title: Sindoor Ek Vachan
subTitle: Shantanu, a man of conviction who lives life according to his own principles, crosses paths with Poorna, who alters both his way of life and his worldview.

title: Shakti Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki
subTitle: Preeto believes Harman and Surbhi are hiding a secret and decides to search their room. Varun sounds the alarm after seeing a mysterious man sneaking out of the house.

title: Suman Indori
subTitle: Forced by fate to marry a rich, shrewd politician, Suman embraces obstacles adjusting to her new life while dealing with her sister-in-law who seeks to become the head of the household.

title: Parineetii
subTitle: Parineet tries to escape from Rakesh's men, and Rajeev comes to her aid just in time. He gets a serious injury after the fight.

title: Comedy Nights Bachao
subTitle: Based on the format of roast comedy, the show features comic crusaders who take a jibe at celebrity guests testing their patience through slapstick humour and make unpleasant jokes about them.

title: Comedy Nights with Kapil
subTitle: Comedian Kapil Sharma, along with his family members, gets up close and personal with celebrity guests. He entertains celebrities and audiences alike by asking comical questions.

title: The Khatra Khatra Show
subTitle: Celebrities challenge host couple, Haarsh Limbachiyaa and Bharti Singh to different eccentric tasks with a mix of many twists and turns, as well as various dares, pranks, and games.

title: Uttaran
subTitle: Meethi and Mukta, daughters of Ichha and Tapasya, respectively, face issues in their lives.

title: Udaan
subTitle: A strong-willed woman determined to free her village from the practice of bonded labour steers through the tempests that the cause brings into her life. Along the way, she achieves her dream of becoming an athlete and finds her life partner.

title: Naagin 6
subTitle: Three powerful shape-shifters reincarnate to finish and settle an age-old score.

title: Madhubala - Ek Ishq Ek Junoon
subTitle: The story of a young girl who inadvertently crosses paths with a self-centred and pompous superstar, Rishabh Kundra.
